Class ProductXmlFileManager<K extends Comparable<K>, T extends Product>

java.lang.Object
src.baseabstractions.AbstractFileManager<Hashtable<K,T>>
src.workwithfiles.ProductXmlFileManager<K,T>
Type Parameters:
K - the type of keys used in the collection, must be Comparable
T - the type of values stored in the collection, must extend Product
public class ProductXmlFileManager<K extends Comparable<K>, T extends Product> extends AbstractFileManager<Hashtable<K,T>>
XML file manager for saving and loading Product collections using XStream library. Handles serialization/deserialization of Hashtable collections with Product objects.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ProductXmlFileManager(String fileName)
    Constructs a ProductXmlFileManager with the specified file name.
    ProductXmlFileManager(String fileName, LongIdManager<T> idManager)
    Constructs a ProductXmlFileManager with the specified file name and ID manager.

    Returns the ID manager used for tracking product IDs.

    Loads the products Hashtable from an XML file.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProductXmlFileManager

      public ProductXmlFileManager(String fileName)
      Constructs a ProductXmlFileManager with the specified file name. Creates a new LongIdManager instance for ID management.
      Parameters:
      fileName - the name of the XML file to manage

    • ProductXmlFileManager

      public ProductXmlFileManager(String fileName, LongIdManager<T> idManager)
      Constructs a ProductXmlFileManager with the specified file name and ID manager.
      Parameters:
      fileName - the name of the XML file to manage
      idManager - the ID manager to use for tracking product IDs

  • Method Details

    • getIdManager

      public LongIdManager<T> getIdManager()
      Returns the ID manager used for tracking product IDs.
      Returns:
      the LongIdManager instance

    • save

      public void save(Hashtable<K,T> products) throws Exception
      Saves the products Hashtable to an XML file. Uses XStream for XML serialization with UTF-8 encoding.
      Specified by:
      save in class AbstractFileManager<Hashtable<K extends Comparable<K>, T extends Product>>
      Parameters:
      products - the Hashtable of products to save
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs during save operation

    • load

      public Hashtable<K,T> load() throws Exception
      Loads the products Hashtable from an XML file. Uses XStream for XML deserialization and populates the ID manager with loaded IDs.
      Specified by:
      load in class AbstractFileManager<Hashtable<K extends Comparable<K>, T extends Product>>
      Returns:
      the loaded Hashtable of products, or an empty Hashtable if loading fails
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs during load operation
